item.description:
## Recappi Mini v1.0.107

### Diagnostics and support logs

- Added a diagnostics log archive export in Settings > General so users can create a `RecappiMiniLogs-*.zip` bundle and send it when reporting issues.
- Added Open Logs Folder actions in the status menu and recording error panel.
- Expanded diagnostics coverage across app launch, macOS permission state, auth, updater, network failures, Cloud cache, recording, upload, and live-caption paths.
- Improved log rotation: Recappi now keeps the current `diagnostics.log` plus up to five rotated log files.
- Added a best-effort uncaught Objective-C exception log entry before crash termination.

### Notes

Some process-level failures, such as Swift fatal errors, SIGKILL, or kernel-level termination, may still require macOS crash reports or future Sentry reporting.
